name: Sync local source of truth to cloud

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.raw_contacts;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_contacts FROM public.raw_contacts;
SELECT * FROM public.raw_members;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_members FROM public.raw_members;

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    force_full: Boolean($('Sync Options').first()?.json?.force_full),
    contacts_rows_synced: Number($('Build raw_contacts sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    members_rows_synced: Number($('Build raw_members sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    member_signups_rows_synced: Number($('Build member_signups sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    signup_batches_rows_synced: Number($('Build signup_batches sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    signup_batch_manual_items_rows_synced: Number($('Build signup_batch_manual_items sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    membership_history_rows_synced: Number($('Build membership_history sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    membership_history_snapshots_rows_synced: Number($('Build membership_history_snapshots sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    workflow_rows_synced: Number($('Build n8n workflow_entity sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    execution_rows_synced: Number($('Build n8n execution_entity sync SQL').first().json.rowCount ?? 0),
    cloud_raw_contacts_count: Number($('Verify cloud raw_contacts').first().json.total_contacts ?? 0),
    cloud_raw_members_count: Number($('Verify cloud raw_members').first().json.total_members ?? 0),
    cloud_member_signups_count: Number($('Verify cloud member_signups').first().json.total_signups ?? 0),
    cloud_signup_batches_count: Number($('Verify cloud signup_batches').first().json.total_batches ?? 0),
    cloud_signup_batch_manual_items_count: Number($('Verify cloud signup_batch_manual_items').first().json.total_rows ?? 0),
    cloud_membership_history_count: Number($('Verify cloud membership_history').first().json.total_rows ?? 0),
    cloud_membership_history_snapshots_count: Number($('Verify cloud membership_history_snapshots').first().json.total_rows ?? 0),
    cloud_workflow_entity_count: Number($('Verify cloud n8n workflow_entity').first().json.total_workflows ?? 0),
    cloud_execution_entity_count: Number($('Verify cloud n8n execution_entity').first().json.total_executions ?? 0),
  },
}];

parameters.query: SELECT signup_date, member, product, payer, cost, quantity, method, status, "First name", "Last name", "Age", email_address, address_1, address_2, address_3, town, postcode, "Tags provided", "Key pin number", id, clubspark_status, batch_id, source FROM public.member_signups ORDER BY id;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_signups FROM public.member_signups;
SELECT id, status, created_at, completed_at, no_address_email_sent FROM public.signup_batches ORDER BY id;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_batches FROM public.signup_batches;

SELECT id, batch_id, created_at, source, member, payer, email_address, address_1, address_2, address_3, town, postcode, regular_tags, parent_tags, key_tags, notes, created_by FROM public.signup_batch_manual_items ORDER BY id;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM public.signup_batch_manual_items;
SELECT * FROM public.membership_history ORDER BY CASE WHEN membership = 'Total' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, membership;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM public.membership_history;
SELECT id, snapshot_key, source_season, membership, member_count, captured_at FROM public.membership_history_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_key, membership;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM public.membership_history_snapshots;

SELECT name, active, nodes, connections, "createdAt", "updatedAt", settings, "staticData", "pinData", "versionId", "triggerCount", id, meta, "parentFolderId", "isArchived", "versionCounter", description, "activeVersionId" FROM n8n.workflow_entity ORDER BY id;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_workflows FROM n8n.workflow_entity;
SELECT id, finished, mode, "retryOf", "retrySuccessId", "startedAt", "stoppedAt", "waitTill", status, "workflowId", "deletedAt", "createdAt" FROM n8n.execution_entity ORDER BY id;
={{ $json.sql }}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_executions FROM n8n.execution_entity;
